Title: Dumont, Albert
Overview: founder of the Ecole Francaise in Rome at the Farnese Palace. Dumont's Ecole attracted many students, among them Eugene Müntz.
Archives: • DUMONT, Albert [Collated], Institut national d'histoire de l'art. https://www.inha.fr/fr/ressources/publications/publications-numeriques/dictionnaire-critique-des-historiens-de-l-art/dumont-albert.html?search-keywords=Dumont%2C+Albert.
